---
title: "Charlotte Pantatun"
---

## Charlotte Pantatun

### Description

wife of [[person:2005]Fisher Pantatun]

### Biography

She was married to Fisher Pantatun by Patteson (2 July 1868).  She was named after CMY.

### Letters

- Letter from November 24, 1869.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
